EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to recover data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to attach storage domains to data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} recovered data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to detach storage domain {object.value} from data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to activate data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to attach storage domain {object.value} to data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} detached storage domain {object.value} from data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} attached storage domains to data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} attached storage domain {object.value} to data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} activated data center "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
